terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceText: By accessing and using Maisy Academy, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.
terms.accountsText: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to provide accurate information during registration and to update it as necessary.
terms.contentText: All course content is provided for educational purposes. You may not reproduce, distribute, or commercially exploit any content without prior written permission.
terms.paymentText: Course purchases are subject to our pricing at the time of purchase. We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for most courses. Refund requests must be submitted through your account.
terms.intellectualText: All content, trademarks, and materials on Maisy Academy are protected by intellectual property laws. Instructors retain ownership of their course content.
terms.terminationText: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, engage in fraudulent activity, or compromise platform security.
terms.liabilityText: Maisy Academy is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.
terms.contactText: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at support@maisyacademy.com.
